summary: A quirky show with a standout Crazy Fingers jam; recording source unclear but overall an enjoyable experience.
review: Both reviewers recall a chaotic, "out‑of‑control" night in Worcester that still left a good impression, highlighting the second‑set Crazy Fingers stretch as the main musical highlight. No concrete details about the audio source are given, so the recording quality remains unknown, though the 4‑star ratings suggest it is at least listenable.

ai_rating.rationale: Two detailed 4‑star reviews point to a solid performance with one notable jam, but lack of any recording‑specific feedback keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewers mention sound clarity or mix; rating inferred from overall star scores.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert is described as a weird, high‑energy night with a chaotic crowd; the second set featured an extended Crazy Fingers jam that stood out amid generally uneven jamming.
